news-korea-econ.description: Tehran's ruling system still does not believe President Donald Trump is prepared to go beyond pressure and dismantle the Islamic Republic of Iran.

news-global-econ.title: Trump jolts immigration hawks with surprising defense of Chinese students in USA
news-global-econ.description: Trump defends Chinese students at U.S. colleges and remarks on farmland ownership, sparking backlash from Marjorie Taylor Greene and immigration hawks.

news-global-econ.title: Ortagus warns Iran trying to ‘buy time’ as Hezbollah blocks peace in Lebanon | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: Former Trump administration official Morgan Ortagus tells Fox News Digital that Iran has historically used negotiations to stall while arguing Hezbollah — not Lebanon itself — remains the biggest obstacle to peace between Israel and its neighbors.

news-global-econ.title: Senate plots permanent end to government shutdowns with bipartisan push
news-global-econ.description: The Senate moves to prevent government shutdowns permanently with bipartisan legislation that would strip lawmakers of recess and travel privileges.

Rep. Wesley Hunt (R-TX) formally threw his support behind Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the Senate race in Texas, urging Republican voters to rally together.

news-korea-soc.description: Rep. Nancy Mace proposes expanding the natural-born citizen requirement beyond the presidency to Congress, federal judges and cabinet appointees.

news-global-soc.title: 'Baywatch' star Brooks Nader's conservative parents banned bikinis growing up as she slips into red swimsuit
news-global-soc.description: Brooks Nader says her conservative parents approve of her "Baywatch" reboot role because the iconic red swimsuit is a one-piece, following family rules.

news-global-soc.title: New drug approach offers hope for patients with recurrent aggressive cancers
news-global-soc.description: Merck announces that sac-TMT, a new cancer drug, demonstrated strong results in phase 3 trials for advanced or recurrent endometrial cancer patients.
